scripts.install4: {   "name": "devpool-api-server",   "version": "1.0.0",   "description": "DevPool API Server - รองรับราคาน้ำมันบางจาก, JSONPlaceholder, ไลค์, และข้อความ",   "main": "server.js",   "scripts": {     "start": "node server.js",     "dev": "nodemon server.js"   },   "engines": {     "node": "24.x"   },   "dependencies": {     "express": "^4.18.2",     "node-fetch": "^3.3.2"   },   "devDependencies": {     "nodemon": "^3.0.1"   } }
